---
title: "Structure-from-motion Post-processing Workflow"
id: module-goals-pp
order: 100
summary: "Build an overview of SfM photogrammetry software and practice optimized workflows for orthoimage and point-cloud generation."
modules:
  - module-postprocessing
materials:
  - material-hs-3
  - material-hs-4
activities:
  - activity-metashape-wf-10
  - activity-metashape-wf-11
  - activity-usecase-1
  - activity-odm-09
  - activity-odm-10
  - activity-odm-15
  - activity-fw-21
  - activity-metashape-altum
assessments:
  - pp-assessment
published: true
source: "../LV-uav-workflow/morea/Postprocessing/module-goals-pp.md"
---

The module is intended to provide a solid overview of the extensive range of structure-from-motion (SfM) photogrammetry software and its use:
* Identify which of the software packages provide good results and are cost effective.
* Using the commercial software Agisoft Metashape, an optimized workflow for orthoimage generation will be demonstrated and practiced.
* Optionally, this workflow is also explained and illustrated with the open source software OpenDroneMap.
* Optional tutorials are available for special tasks.
